## Quotation candidates (auto excerpt)

**gt-10 (excerpt):** - Formalizes a “law of asymmetry”: apparent imperial strengths (mass, organization, depth of loss tolerance) invert over time into weaknesses. - Maps US advantages (technology, propaganda, money) and Iranian advantages (faith, terrain, nationalism) to how each can backfire. - Ends by reframing payoffs: attention/consciousness as currency vs purely material game-theory rewards. ---
